name: phaser-app
description: A template for a Phaser app.
author: DylanCheetah

scripts.build: npm run build:copy && npm run build:vendor && npm run build:bundle
scripts.serve: npm run build:copy && npm run build:vendor && npm run serve:budo
scripts.build:vendor: browserify -r phaser -r react -r react-dom | uglifyjs --compress --mangle > dist/vendor.js
scripts.build:bundle: browserify src/main.js -x phaser -x react -x react-dom | uglifyjs --compress --mangle > dist/bundle.js
scripts.serve:budo: budo src/main.js -p 8000 --serve /bundle.js --live --dir dist/ -d -- -x phaser -x react -x react-dom
